changelog: Native push: APNs/FCM token registration listeners (registration/received/action) report token to backend (nativePush.ts); wired on login + push-toggle, torn down on logout

Native BLE: bleManager now has dual backend - Web Bluetooth (PWA) + @capacitor-community/bluetooth-le (native), selected by isNativePlatform; same GATT UUIDs/callbacks (native transfer layer needs real-device validation)

Native (Capacitor) permissions: permissions.ts + notifications now use native plugins on iOS/Android (push/local-notifications, camera, bluetooth-le) via isNativePlatform branch; Android manifest permissions added; iOS Info.plist + setup documented in docs/NATIVE_SETUP.md

iOS/Android adaptation: ship real PNG icons (192/512/apple-touch-180/badge-96) — iOS ignores SVG home-screen icons and Android notification icons must be raster; manifest now PNG + maskable; apple-touch-icon PNG + apple-mobile-web-app-title; notifications use existing PNG icon/badge; outage notif goes through SW (iOS PWA compatible)

Fix Real-Time Power chart: history never loaded (useHistoryFetcher checked res.success which does not exist -> now isApiSuccess(res.code)); widen zoom/pan gesture area to whole chart + add desktop wheel-zoom

Web Push (client side): subscribe via VAPID + report PushSubscription to backend on enabling notifications; idempotent re-sync on launch; unsubscribe on logout. Workbox SW now importScripts sw-push.js so server pushes display when app is closed/locked (requires backend VAPID push to deliver)

Low battery: banner threshold text now reflects Settings value; global low-battery monitor polls all devices app-wide and pushes a system notification when SOC crosses the threshold (fires while app runs in foreground or background; 30-min per-device throttle)
Insights: remove Battery Health card (ring + Battery/Temperature/Days/Health tiles)
Unify battery remaining/to-full time across app: DebugParamsPage + DevicePage low-battery banner now use batteryTimeLabel (capacity=acInvOutputPowerx2 Wh); removed duplicate/old buggy formulas
Battery ring time estimate: default rated capacity fallback 5000Wh -> 1000Wh when nameplate not cached
Fix battery ring time estimate: use real capacity (acInvOutputPower x2 Wh) so remaining/to-full = energyWh / power (was treating SOC%% as Wh, e.g. wrong 11m)

UI polish: tabular numbers on live values (no jitter), scale-on-press feedback on buttons, balanced heading/body text wrap, skip page-enter animation on first load, replace transition-all with explicit properties
Remove swipe-to-back gesture on Overview and Device Monitor pages (prevent accidental navigation)

Real-Time Power chart: real time X-axis (12am/4am/8am/12pm/4pm/8pm/12am), pinch-to-zoom + pan (min 1 hour), today's API history (paginated + IndexedDB cache); realtime value shown only in top-right badge
Standardize backend API params (isApiSuccess, normalizeCountryCode, CaptchaIntent) + document page/label/API conventions in CLAUDE.md
Unify UI metric labels: battery=Battery(%), AC input=AC, temperature=Temperature(°F); remove dead pages (DeviceInfoPage, PeakShavingPage)
Device list: fetch every device's battery on enter + refresh all every 60s (was only updating one device due to single-slot state)
Device monitor: back arrow + swipe now return to Device list (was going back in history)
Unified page transition animations across all routes (no flicker switching Overview ↔ Device list)
Overview: horizontal swipe gesture returns to Device list page
Fix: username update 'illegal argument' (no userId sent to iotUserInfo)
Fix: password update 'illegal argument' (no userId sent to authPassword)
EmailJS configured for in-app feedback form
